# Auto-generated by modulestrap — safe to customize.
# Only compile Pounce sources when it's the selected UI backend — no LVGL,
# no vendored MiniWin, so unlike those two this component has no third-party
# REQUIRES to worry about keeping unconditional (see kittenui/CMakeLists.txt's
# comment on why THEIR lvgl__lvgl REQUIRES must stay unconditional even
# though SRCS is gated — that reasoning doesn't apply here, Pounce has no
# equivalent dependency).
if(CONFIG_PURR_UI_BACKEND_POUNCE)
    set(POUNCE_SRCS
        pounce_module.c
        pounce_win.c
        pounce_render.c
        pounce_focus.c
        pounce_status.c
        pounce_launcher.c
    )
else()
    set(POUNCE_SRCS "")
endif()

idf_component_register(
    SRCS ${POUNCE_SRCS}
    INCLUDE_DIRS
        .
        ../../kernel/core
        ../../kernel/catcalls
        ../../modules/app_manager
    REQUIRES esp_common driver freertos nvs_flash esp_timer
)
